diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,140 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Hono, types (Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions)
+- Internal names: Hono
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point exporting the Hono class and re-exporting types from other modules
+- Copy-safe detail: Single export point pulling classes and types from src/hono and src/modules
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Bindings, Variables, Env, Next, Input, BlankSchema, RouterRoute, Handler types, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names: IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, RemoveBlankRecord, Simplify, UnionToIntersection
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for Hono including environment types, handler types, and request handler interfaces
+- Copy-safe detail: Type declarations for Env, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, and all route handler interface types
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names: HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class that extends HonoBase and sets up default router
+- Copy-safe detail: Class definition with configurable router and constructor
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, fetch, request, fire
+- Internal names: compose, Context, H, Env, Router, HonoOptions, GetPath, HttpMethod, Router, RouterRoute, NotFoundHandler, Next, Schema, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, Hono
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class with route handler definition and request dispatching logic
+- Copy-safe detail: Class with route storage, path management, handler registration, and request handling dispatch mechanism
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, execution contexts, render, setRenderer, header, body, json, text, html, redirect, notFound, get, set, var, newResponse
+- Internal names: HonoRequest, Env, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, Renderer, PropsForRenderer, Layout, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, JSONRespondReturn, HTMLRespond, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, StatusCode, TextRespond, BaseMime, ResponseHeadersInit, ResponseInit, ResponseOrInit
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Context implementation providing request/response handling for HTTP handlers
+- Copy-safe detail: Class with private request/cache, public env/error/res, helper methods for response rendering and state management
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest utility
+- Internal names: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Result, Input, ValidationTargets, Body, BodyCache, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, decodeURIComponen
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request class wrapping native Request for parameter/header/query parsing and body caching
+- Copy-safe detail: Class extracting param/query/header from request, async body methods with caching to prevent stream consumption
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Internal names: (none)
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Symbol constant for match result identification
+- Copy-safe detail: Single symbol export
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions
+- Internal names: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Form data parsing from request body
+- Copy-safe detail: Async function parsing Form Data via Request.formData(), handling all/dot/dot-parsing options
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose
+- Internal names: Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition based on koa-compose pattern
+- Copy-safe detail: Factory returning dispatch function with index tracking
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException
+- Internal names: ContentfulStatusCode, HTTPExceptionOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP error class for 4xx/5xx with optional Response
+- Copy-safe detail: ES6 class with status and optional response initialization
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names: InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./client/utils, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client for Hono exporting main client functionality
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports core client APIs and parseResponse utility
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc (proxy builder)
+- Internal names: ClientRequestImpl, URL params, Query params, pathParams, buildSearchParams, body, content-type, head, get, post, put, delete, patch, all, $all, $ws
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./client/types, ./client/utils
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client proxy generator for Hono API client with typed routes
+- Copy-safe detail: Factory function returning Proxy that builds request chains with method definitions
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, Client
+- Internal names: MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, HonoRequest, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, KnownResponseFormat, ResponseFormat, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, HasRequiredKeys, BuildSearch, BuildPathname, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, ParseHostName, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, IsEmptyObject, TypedURL, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, PickRoute, PickSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript types for HTTP client including request/response inference and protocol handling
+- Copy-safe detail: Complex type definitions for client request/response, including URL construction and type extraction from endpoint schema
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Internal names: DetailedError, ContentfulStatusCode, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for URL manipulation and response parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: Path manipulation, query param serialization, protocol switching, and fetch result parsing with type inference
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire
+- Internal names: handle, Hono, Env, Schema, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter to register Hono app with addEventListener
+- Copy-safe detail: Fire function adding fetch listener, delegates through handle adapter
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle
+- Internal names: HandleOptions, FetchEvent, Hono, Env, Schema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./types/fetch-event
+- Plain-English summary: Fetch event handler that routes through Hono app
+- Copy-safe detail: Async handler awaiting app.fetch and fanning to secondary fetch on 404
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent
+- Internal names: ExtendableEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Extended fetch event interface with preload support
+- Copy-safe detail: Interface extending AddEventListenerEvent with preloadResponse property
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

I need to start by creating the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist, then read all the specified files from the repository to understand their contents before writing the benchmark documentation file. Let me begin by creating the directory and reading the files.
